title: Policy for the Responsible Use of AI in Government
notes: Revision-bound browser re-verification prepared for Daniel Alkurdi's substantive editorial review. Staging does not constitute approval.

analysis.summary: Whole-of-government policy setting mandatory requirements for the safe, transparent, and accountable use of AI by Australian Government agencies.
agencies: Data and Digital Government Strategy Branch

proposedRecord.title: Policy for the Responsible Use of AI in Government
proposedRecord.description: Commonwealth policy setting mandatory requirements for the safe, transparent, and accountable use of AI by non-corporate Commonwealth entities.
proposedRecord.content: Version 2.0 took effect on 15 December 2025 and applies to all non-corporate Commonwealth entities, with specified exceptions. It requires accountable officials, transparency statements, a strategic approach to AI adoption, operational controls for responsible AI use, AI use-case accountability and registers, staff training, and AI use-case impact assessments.
proposedRecord.aiSummary: Core Commonwealth policy governing responsible AI use by non-corporate Commonwealth entities from 15 December 2025.

verification.notes: Daniel Alkurdi compared the record against the official digital.gov.au landing page and version 2.0 PDF. Approved corrections: classify the instrument as a policy; retain the Digital Transformation Agency as the supported agency; narrow the scope wording to non-corporate Commonwealth entities; and update the descriptions accordingly. The fresh page and PDF fingerprints matched the staged evidence.

title: Agentic AI addendum to the AI technical standard for Australian Government
notes: Discovered during the scheduled manual review of the digital.gov.au AI policy hub.

analysis.summary: DTA addendum extending the Australian Government AI technical standard with secure and governed agentic-AI implementation guidance.

proposedRecord.title: Agentic AI addendum to the AI technical standard for Australian Government
proposedRecord.description: Australian Government best-practice standard for secure and governed implementation of agentic AI systems.
proposedRecord.content: The Agentic AI addendum provides best-practice guidance for Australian Government agencies exploring, developing or using agentic AI. It applies alongside the Australian Government AI technical standard and addresses agentic considerations across the AI lifecycle, including design, data, training, evaluation, integration, monitoring and decommissioning. The underlying technical-standard statements, criteria and general guidance continue to apply.
proposedRecord.aiSummary: DTA addendum extending the Australian Government AI technical standard with secure and governed agentic-AI implementation guidance.

verification.notes: Checked against the official DTA page, including scope and the displayed 4 June 2026 last-updated date. Migration review on 17 July 2026 confirmed that the page remained available through an independent browser retrieval, but Policai's controlled retriever timed out and no canonical fingerprint could be established. The record is withheld pending fingerprinted re-verification.

approvalNotes: Checked against the official DTA page, including scope and the displayed 4 June 2026 last-updated date.
